---
title: "ChronicleEntityRef"
---
<!-- DO NOT EDIT! This file was auto-generated by crates/build/re_types_builder/src/codegen/docs/website.rs -->

An entity reference associating a Chronicle event with a typed entity.

Entity refs are the many-to-many mapping between events and entities
(e.g. linking an event to customer "cust_123" and ticket "tkt_456").
Logged as a component on the event entity path.

## Fields
### Required
* `entity_type`: [`ChronicleEntityType`](../components/chronicle_entity_type.md)
* `entity_id`: [`ChronicleEntityId`](../components/chronicle_entity_id.md)


## Can be shown in
* [ChronicleTimelineView](../views/chronicle_timeline_view.md)
* [DataframeView](../views/dataframe_view.md)
